name: test_programmes_rav_pre_screening_questions
description:
Steps to reproduce:
Patient setup: in a school session today, marked as attending, session has HPV and doubles, patients is eligible for all vaccines (has consent, correct year group, no history)
Complete pre-screening questions and vaccinate the patient for any one vaccine (eg. HPV)
Testing has confirmed the following:
Two vaccinations in same session
- If HPV is followed by MenACWY then "feeling well" is pre-filled
- If HPV is followed by Td/IPV  then both "feeling well" and "not pregnant" are pre-populated
- If MenACWY followed by Td/IPV then "feeling well" is pre-filled
- If MenCAWY followed by HPV then "feeling well" is pre-filled
- If Td/IPV followed by MenACWY  then "feeling well" is pre-filled
- If Td/IPV is followed by HPV  then both "feeling well" and "not pregnant" are pre-populated
descriptionHtml:
Steps to reproduce:
Patient setup: in a school session today, marked as attending, session has HPV and doubles, patients is eligible for all vaccines (has consent, correct year group, no history)
Complete pre-screening questions and vaccinate the patient for any one vaccine (eg. HPV)
Testing has confirmed the following:
Two vaccinations in same session

  • If HPV is followed by MenACWY then "feeling well" is pre-filled
  • If HPV is followed by Td/IPV then both "feeling well" and "not pregnant" are pre-populated
  • If MenACWY followed by Td/IPV then "feeling well" is pre-filled
  • If MenCAWY followed by HPV then "feeling well" is pre-filled
  • If Td/IPV followed by MenACWY then "feeling well" is pre-filled
  • If Td/IPV is followed by HPV then both "feeling well" and "not pregnant" are pre-populated

Actual value: <element(s) not found>

statusTrace:
setup_mav_965 = ('ABC123', 'ABC123', 'ABC123')
schools = [School(name='Abbey College Cambridge', urn='136083'), School(name='Anglo European School', urn='137727')]
programmes_page = <mavis.test.pages.programmes.ProgrammesPage object at 0x7f9e3ddd4050>
dashboard_page = <mavis.test.pages.dashboard.DashboardPage object at 0x7f9e3ffb5a70>
sessions_page = <mavis.test.pages.sessions.SessionsPage object at 0x7f9e3ddd4410>
consent_page = <mavis.test.pages.consent.ConsentPage object at 0x7f9e3ddd42d0>
children = [Child(first_name='Gemma', last_name='WOOD', nhs_number='4460543125', address=('Studio 0', 'Diane avenue', 'Jeremyfort...rt@example.com'), Parent(full_name='Miss Denise Frost', relationship='Mum', email_address='hazeltaylor@example.com')))]

    @allure.issue("MAV-965")
    @allure.issue("MAV-955")
    @pytest.mark.rav
    @pytest.mark.bug
    def test_programmes_rav_pre_screening_questions(
        setup_mav_965,
        schools,
        programmes_page,
        dashboard_page,
        sessions_page,
        consent_page,
        children,
    ):
        """
        Steps to reproduce:
        Patient setup: in a school session today, marked as attending, session has HPV and doubles, patients is eligible for all vaccines (has consent, correct year group, no history)
        Complete pre-screening questions and vaccinate the patient for any one vaccine (eg. HPV)
        Testing has confirmed the following:
        Two vaccinations in same session
        - If HPV is followed by MenACWY then "feeling well" is pre-filled
        - If HPV is followed by Td/IPV  then both "feeling well" and "not pregnant" are pre-populated
        - If MenACWY followed by Td/IPV then "feeling well" is pre-filled
        - If MenCAWY followed by HPV then "feeling well" is pre-filled
        - If Td/IPV followed by MenACWY  then "feeling well" is pre-filled
        - If Td/IPV is followed by HPV  then both "feeling well" and "not pregnant" are pre-populated
        """
    
        child_name = str(children[0])
        gardasil_9_batch_name, menquadfi_batch_name, revaxis_batch_name = setup_mav_965
    
        dashboard_page.click_mavis()
        dashboard_page.click_sessions()
        sessions_page.click_location(schools[0])
        sessions_page.click_consent_tab()
        sessions_page.search_child(child_name=child_name)
        sessions_page.click_programme_tab(Programme.HPV)
        sessions_page.click_get_verbal_consent()
        consent_page.parent_verbal_positive(
            parent=children[0].parents[0], change_phone=False
        )
        sessions_page.search_child(child_name=child_name)
        sessions_page.click_programme_tab(Programme.MENACWY)
        sessions_page.click_get_verbal_consent()
        consent_page.parent_verbal_positive(
            parent=children[0].parents[0], change_phone=False, programme=Programme.MENACWY
        )
    
        sessions_page.search_child(child_name=child_name)
        sessions_page.click_programme_tab(Programme.TD_IPV)
        sessions_page.click_get_verbal_consent()
        consent_page.parent_verbal_positive(
            parent=children[0].parents[0], change_phone=False, programme=Programme.TD_IPV
        )
        sessions_page.register_child_as_attending(child_name=child_name)
>       sessions_page.record_vaccs_for_child(
            child_name=child_name,
            programme=Programme.HPV,
            batch_name=gardasil_9_batch_name,
            notes=generate_random_string(target_length=1001, spaces=True),  # MAV-955
        )

tests/test_reset.py:88: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

self = <mavis.test.pages.sessions.SessionsPage object at 0x7f9e3ddd4410>
child_name = 'WOOD, Gemma', programme = <Programme.HPV: 'HPV'>
batch_name = 'ABC123', at_school = True
notes = 'Into follow behavior until. central sing later pass indeed by discussion this four drug manage open course leg child ... security remember heart nor a participant yard degree whole discover beautiful whom south sense energy out friend per'

    def record_vaccs_for_child(
        self,
        child_name: str,
        programme: Programme,
        batch_name: str,
        at_school: bool = True,
        notes: str = "",
    ):
        self.click_record_vaccinations()
        self.search_child(child_name=child_name)
        self.click_programme_tab(programme)
    
        self.confirm_pre_screening_checks(programme)
        self.pre_screening_notes.fill(notes)
    
        self.select_yes()
        self.select_left_arm_upper_position()
        self.click_continue_button()
    
        if len(notes) > 1000:
>           expect(self.notes_length_error).to_be_visible()
E           AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible
E           Actual value: <element(s) not found> 
E           Call log:
E             - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 5000ms
E             - waiting for locator("div").filter(has_text="There is a problemEnter").nth(3)
